user.title: JeeLink LaCrosse
user.description: Select the serial port of your JeeLink stick.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the JeeLink. Check the path and baud rate.

confirm.title: Assign new LaCrosse ID
confirm.description:
Offline sensor(s): {offline_sensors}.
A likely battery-changed sensor was detected. Pick the offline sensor and its new ID — the value shows the last reading to help you match — to keep its history and entities.

abort.entry_not_loaded: The integration is not loaded right now. The issue stays open and can be fixed later.
abort.already_resolved: Nothing to do anymore — the sensor is back online or the unknown ID disappeared.

init.title: JeeLink sensors
init.description: Manage the LaCrosse sensors for this JeeLink.

add_sensor.title: Add sensor
add_sensor.description: Pick a received LaCrosse ID from the list — the value in parentheses is the last reading — or type a different ID. Then give it a name.

error.id_in_use: This LaCrosse ID is already assigned to another sensor.
error.invalid_id: Please enter a valid LaCrosse ID between 0 and 255.
